tasks.label: Push Pages fix
tasks.command: git status --short && git add .github/workflows/build-deploy.yml index.html manifest.json 404.html robots.txt && git commit -m "Fix Pages asset deployment"

tasks.label: Commit Pages fix
tasks.command: git status --short; git add .github/workflows/build-deploy.yml index.html manifest.json 404.html robots.txt; git commit -m "Fix Pages asset deployment"

tasks.label: Commit Pages fix
tasks.command: git status --short; git add .github/workflows/build-deploy.yml index.html manifest.json 404.html robots.txt; git commit -m 'Fix Pages asset deployment'
